warnings: GRID-RELEVANT (reporting only, master file not edited): bottom dimension chain reads (right to left, rows A to E) '2.05 | 1.50 | 4.00 | 2.20 | 3.00 | 1.50' totaling 10.70 — matches the master grid's y_lines exactly, mirrored order vs. elevation 2 (หน้า10).
This elevation corresponds to compass-slot '4' on the floor plan's 4-way elevation callout bubble (referencing sheet A-10).

Window '3' (awning type, appearing twice on this elevation) matches the D/W schedule's window type 3 (บานกระทุ้ง, aluminum, EQ+EQ split width 1.40m) — likely the bathroom vent windows for WC.1/WC.2, consistent with this elevation showing the bathroom-side wall.
Individual door/window opening-number-to-D/W-schedule cross-match not confidently resolvable at this resolution for every tag — see _หน้า16_door_window_schedule.json for the schedule itself.
